land_price_provenance: INCRA, Atlas do Mercado de Terras 2025 (ref. Dec 2024), AM-1502 Oeste Amazonense all-use average VTI R$1,525.62/ha; FX BRL->USD 0.1934 (26 Jun 2026) = USD 295/ha. Degraded-pasture VTN lower anchor ~USD 210/ha. Cross-check: Receita Federal VTN 2022 (parcel municipalities R$271-1,116/ha).
_note: Avoided-loss $/ha (30-yr NPV). Area-invariant at fixed w, so per-ha is uniform across parcels; total scales with area. f_loss is a non-backtested scenario -> reported as a RANGE. Lower bound (water + one crop + one sink).
